title: Banner&Lodestone Locator Bar
description: Place a banner on top of a lodestone to see it on the locator bar !
body:
Have you ever wanted to use the Locator bar to locate your base, your farm, or even just a cool spot where you want to come back later ?

With Banner&Lodestone you don't need to screen or write down your coordinates anymore, this is a lightweight, survival friendly way to locate spots where you've already been in your minecraft world !

Simply place a banner on top of a lodestone and a dot matching the color of the banner will appear on your locator bar !

![all the banners](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JmJwea5M/images/5263e46c3418d22f6caa14ace87fcb71eb2f7e9a.png)
And if you wish to remove a dot, you just need to break the banner, it's as simple as that !


If you have any issue/question, contact me on discord! (@nugrevan) : https://discord.gg/SxarRKTw8k, any feedback will be greatly appreciated, thanks !
